info.name: Shop CRM System API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Shop CRM System. Base URL: https://shopcrmsystem-production.up.railway.app/api/v1

Test credentials: username=ulugbek17, password=npassword
Store ID: 16, Branch ID: 24, Worker ID: 15

request.description: Login and get JWT tokens. Test script automatically saves access and refresh tokens to collection variables.
Register a new user and create a store.
Logout and blacklist the refresh token.
List all workers in the store.
Get a specific worker by ID.
Update a worker's role, salary, status and permissions.
Update store settings. All fields are optional (partial update).
Get a specific branch by ID.
Open a new shift for a branch.
Close a shift with cash count.
List subcategories filtered by category ID.
Create a new subcategory under a parent category.
Create a new exchange rate for a currency.
Delete a product by ID. Change ID to a test product.
Get barcode image for a product.
Get QR code image for a product.
Scan product by barcode or QR code.
Generate bulk QR codes for multiple products.
Bulk update sale prices for multiple products in a single atomic transaction. AuditLog yozadi (field: sale_price, bulk: true).
Record a payment to a supplier.
Create multiple stock movements at once.
Get stock levels grouped by product.
Get products with stock below the low stock threshold.
Get stock batch details by ID.
Create a new stock transfer from warehouse to branch.
Record a wastage for a product.
Get wastage record details by ID.
Create a new stock audit for a warehouse.
Confirm a stock audit and apply adjustments.
Create a new customer group with discount.
Get customer details including debt sales.
Oddiy naqd to'lov. paid_amount = items jami narxi bilan teng bo'lishi shart.

Savdo darajasida chegirma. 10 000 so'm chegirma 3 ta mahsulotga proporsional taqsimlanadi:
- A (30k → 27k), B (20k → 18k), C (50k → 45k)
paid_amount = total_price - discount_amount = 100k - 10k = 90k

item.name: Create Sale — Katalog chegirma + savdo chegirma (ikki qatlam)

request.description:
Ikki qatlamli chegirma:
1-qatlam (katalog): A mahsulot 30k → 10% → 27k; B mahsulot 50k → 20% → 40k
2-qatlam (savdo): 9k chegirma 3 ta mahsulotga proporsional taqsimlanadi

original_price + item_discount_pct berilsa — unit_price backend hisoblaydi.
unit_price berilsa — original_price shart emas (oddiy mahsulot).

item.name: Create Sale — Aralash to'lov (MIXED: naqd + karta)

request.description:
Aralash to'lov: naqd + karta.
cash_amount + card_amount = paid_amount (net narx) bo'lishi SHART.
Ikkalasi ham 0 dan katta bo'lishi kerak.
Debt (nasiya) MIXED ga qo'shilmaydi.

Nasiya to'lov. paid_amount <= net_price. debt_amount = net_price - paid_amount.
customer majburiy (nasiya kimga?). Customer.debt_balance avtomatik yangilanadi.
Cancel a sale and restore stock.
Download sale receipt as PDF (80mm thermal printer format). Sarlavha: do'kon nomi, filial, kassir, sana. Mahsulotlar jadvali, jami, chegirma, to'lov, qarz.
Delete an expense category by ID.
List KPI data for all workers.

item.name: Get Worker KPI by Worker ID

request.description: Get KPI data for a specific worker.
Set KPI targets for a worker.
Get dashboard with date range and branch filter.
Export sales data as Excel file.
Export expenses data as Excel file.
Export stock levels as Excel file.
Export stock movements as Excel file.
Download Excel template for importing products.
Download Excel template for importing customers.
Get audit log details by ID.
Yangi aksiya yaratish (manager+). Kamida products, categories yoki subcategories dan biri bo'lishi shart.
Ayrim mahsulotlarga aksiya. products ro'yxatida mahsulot IDlari.
Aksiya tafsilotlari — products, categories, subcategories nested.
Aksiyani o'chirish (manual) — is_active=False qiladi. valid_to o'tsa avtomatik ham ishlamaydi.
original_price va item_discount_pct berilmagan — server faol aksiyani avtomatik topib qo'llaydi. Aksiya bo'lmasa sale_price ishlatiladi.

body.raw: {"code": "WELCOME30", "type": "free_days", "value": "30", "max_uses": 100, "valid_from": "2026-03-23T00:00:00Z", "valid_to": "2026-12-31T23:59:59Z", "for_new_only": true, "is_active": true, "description": "Yangi do'konlar uchun 30 kun bepul"}
